name: United Against Malnutrition and Hunger
address: Alliance to End Malnutrition and Hunger Limited (known as United Against Malnutrition and Hunger), 71-75 Shelton Street, London WC2H 9JQ

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
payments.summary: International visit to Tanzania between 21 June 2025 and 27 June 2025 — To attend the Agriculture, Nutrition and Health (ANH) Academy Week Conference in Dar es Salaam, to see the impact of UK overseas development in treating and preventing malnutrition in Tanzania and Zanzibar, and to understand the work of national and regional government, scientists, health workers, humanitarian organisations, charities, civil society, local businesses, and local communities in tackling malnutrition.
payments.description: Flights (£1,790), accommodation (£810), travel medication (£76), food, visa, transport and in-country expenses (£365)

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
payments.summary: International visit to Tanzania between 21 June 2025 and 27 June 2025 — Travelled as Co-Chair of the APPG on Nutrition for Development to attend the Agriculture, Nutrition and Health (ANH) Academy Week Conference in Dar es Salaam, to see the impact of UK overseas development in treating and preventing malnutrition in Tanzania and Zanzibar, and to understand the work of national and regional government, scientists, health workers, humanitarian organisations, charities, civil society, local businesses, and local communities in tackling malnutrition.
payments.description: Flights (£1,130), accommodation (£810), travel medication (£47.99), food, visa, transport and in-country expenses (£373.85)

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development

payments.description: Flights: (£1,120), accommodation (£810), travel medication (£56), food, visa, transport, and in-country expenses: (£365)

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
payments.summary: International visit to France between 26 March 2025 and 28 March 2025 — Travelled as Co-Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development to attend the 2025 Paris Nutrition for Growth Summit as one of the two official UK Parliamentary delegates.
payments.description:
Total value: £1,025 (plus any additional, individual expenses incurred)
Travel – £300
Accommodation – £530
Food and in-country expenses – £195

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development

payments.summary: International visit to France between 18 February 2025 and 19 February 2025 — To visit Paris as Co-Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development for meetings with French Parliamentarians and partners ahead of the 2025 Paris Nutrition for Growth Summit.
payments.description: Travel (£218), accommodation (£170), food and in-country expenses (£67)
